question: Which income level segment has the largest share in the last year shown?

options.A: The orange segment (low income) shows the largest share.
options.B: Cannot determine which income level segment has the largest share without a legend to explain what each color represents.
options.C: The green segment (upper-middle income) indicates the largest share.
options.D: The purple segment (high income) shows the largest share.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
